files.notes: This file contains three distinct articles that flow together. The main article 'Opening the Gate Beautiful to Women' is unsigned, followed by 'A Sentiment' by Julia P. M. Farnsworth, and 'The Rays of Science in the Home' by Amy Lyman Merrill. All three articles relate to the centennial of Joseph Smith's First Vision in 1820 and its impact on women's rights and opportunities.

files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections as indicated by the Roman numerals and clear subject divisions. The last lesson appears to be cut off mid-sentence, suggesting the file may be incomplete. Each lesson has distinct topics: genealogy/baptism for the dead, literature/Tennyson, Book of Mormon prophecy, and health/nutrition.
